data.title: Minimalistic Design
data.description: A clean, user-focused interface that highlights important content.
data.technical_spec: Flat design, white space utilization, clear navigation.

data.title: Consistency and Standards
data.description: Ensuring consistent design and functionality across the platform.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: UI that adapts seamlessly to different screen sizes and devices.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries, flexible grid layouts.

data.title: Feedback and Interaction
data.description: Providing immediate feedback for user actions to enhance interaction quality.

data.title: Accessibility Standards
data.description: Compliance with accessibility standards to cater to users with disabilities.
data.technical_spec: ARIA roles, keyboard navigability, screen reader support.
